rows.label: qev086903_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh-ho-ho-hoooo! Greetings, and
welcome to Dorian Caravan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086903_MSG0002
rows.name:
Something troubling friends? In
search of rare item, perhaps?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086903_MSG0003
rows.name: Yes, actually.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086903_MSG0004
rows.name:
We're looking for aerozium, and
heard we might find some here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086903_MSG0005
rows.name:
Aerozium? Yes, Dorian
Caravan trade in aerozium.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086903_MSG0006
rows.name: Yay! We did it, Celica![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086903_MSG0007
rows.name: Wonderful![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086903_MSG0008
rows.name:
Friends always this impatient?
Listen to whole answer![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086903_MSG0009
rows.name:
Caravan trade in aerozium, yes, but
aerozium fresh out of stock, sorry![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086903_MSG0010
rows.name: Aw, crud![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086903_MSG0011
rows.name: Well, that's a problem.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086903_MSG0012
rows.name:
And it means poor Rock
will have to wait...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086903_MSG0013
rows.name:
No, no... Beautiful lady,
no crying, please![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086903_MSG0014
rows.name:
Aaah, fine, FINE! Tsumuji cannot stand
to see such display from such beauty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086903_MSG0015
rows.name:
Just this once, Tsumuji share his
source as special exception.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086903_MSG0016
rows.name: Really?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086903_MSG0017
rows.name: Tsumuji never go back on word![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086903_MSG0018
rows.name: Ohh, thank you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086903_MSG0019
rows.name: Friends listen well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086903_MSG0020
rows.name:
Nearby is strange place with
big rocks floating in air.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086903_MSG0021
rows.name: Aerozium is mined from floaty rocks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086903_MSG0022
rows.name: Understood. We shall go there at once.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086903_MSG0023
rows.name:
Friends be careful. Floaty rock
zone also home to bitey critters.
Not safest place around...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086903_MSG0024
rows.name: We understand.[ST:wait ]
